decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing Indomitable Creativity to cheat big creatures like Archon of Cruelty onto the battlefield, while also utilizing Leyline Binding to control the opponent's board. The deck also has a unique twist with cards like Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker to add a creative element to the combo strategy. With a mix of powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Wrenn and Six, along with efficient removal spells and a well-balanced mana base, this deck aims to surprise and overwhelm opponents with its inventive playstyle.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through a combination of hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize, counter spells like Counterspell and Force of Negation, and removal spells like Fatal Push. The creatures in the deck, such as Orcish Bowmasters, Psychic Frog, and Quantum Riddler, provide additional ways to control the board while also providing card advantage. The deck aims to control the game through a mix of disruption and card advantage until it can eventually win with a powerful threat like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares.

This control deck focuses on utilizing a variety of spells and creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage and board control. By combining powerful control spells like Force of Negation and Leyline Binding with creatures like Shardless Agent and Scion of Draco, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and dictate the pace of the game. The diversity of card types and colors allows for flexible gameplay and adaptability to different matchups. The key strategy revolves around controlling the board and resources while maintaining a steady stream of threats and disruption.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards that allow for quick and efficient graveyard recursion to bring powerful creatures back onto the battlefield. The deck aims to exploit the reanimation strategy by using spells like Faithless Looting, Thoughtseize, and Persist to fill the graveyard with key targets such as Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones. By using cards like Unearth and Fatal Push, the deck can quickly reanimate creatures and control the battlefield, overwhelming opponents with powerful threats.

The deck revolves around the powerful combo of Amulet of Vigor and Primeval Titan, along with the utility lands like Urza's Saga and Tolaria West. By utilizing cards like Arboreal Grazer and Explore to ramp quickly, the deck aims to assemble its key pieces to win the game efficiently. With access to cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith for additional consistency and reach, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents with its strong synergies and explosive plays.

The main idea of this deck is to utilize the interaction between Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker to generate a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes various support cards such as Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga to ensure consistency and efficiency in setting up the combo. Additionally, there are cards like Emrakul, the Promised End and Kozilek's Command for added control and versatility. Overall, the deck aims to create a strong board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards a game-winning combo.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Monastery Swiftspear, and Slickshot Show-Off, while also controlling the board with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart. The deck aims to maintain a fast pace and pressure the opponent early on, utilizing card draw and manipulation with cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to keep the aggression going. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with early creatures and burn spells before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with various abilities to create powerful combos and synergies, allowing for flexibility and adaptability in different matchups. The toolbox aspect of the deck allows for the player to search for specific creatures needed for specific situations, while also utilizing cards like Green Sun's Zenith to help find key pieces of the combo. The deck also includes cards that provide card draw and graveyard recursion, ensuring that the player maintains resources and can continue to execute their game plan effectively.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a combination of powerful Eldrazi creatures and the UrzaTron lands. By using the UrzaTron lands to generate massive amounts of mana, the deck can quickly ramp into its big threats like Ugin, the Spirit Dragon and Karn, the Great Creator. The deck also includes disruption spells like Thought-Knot Seer and Chalice of the Void to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of powerful threats and disruption, the deck aims to take control of the game and dominate the battlefield.

The deck focuses on rapidly deploying artifacts to generate advantage and put pressure on the opponent. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mox Opal, the deck aims to flood the board with artifacts while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt. The inclusion of cards like Urza's Saga and Engineered Explosives provide additional win conditions and board control. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive artifact-based strategy.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on creating an aggressive creature presence on the battlefield, utilizing a mix of creatures with various abilities and spells to deal damage to the opponent quickly and efficiently. The deck also includes a few control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own creatures. With a strong mix of creatures, spells, and lands, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful assault, while also maintaining some level of creature and spell versatility.

The deck focuses on using instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance to cheat powerful creatures like Griselbrand into play quickly. By using cards like Ephemerate and Faithful Mending to dig for combo pieces and protect key pieces like Atraxa, Grand Unifier, the deck aims to quickly assemble a game-ending combo. Quantum Riddler and Psychic Frog serve as disruptive elements to control the opponent's board while Superior Spider-Man provides a backup win condition. The deck's strategy is to quickly set up a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent before they can respond.

The main concept revolves around utilizing creature toolbox cards and combo pieces to assemble a strong board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck focuses on tutoring for specific creatures with Chord of Calling, using cards like Cauldron Familiar and Gilded Goose for value generation, and utilizing cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician for control and synergy with other creatures. The deck also includes removal and protection spells to ensure the combo pieces can stick around and generate value efficiently.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly build a board presence with aggressive creatures such as White Orchid Phantom and Ocelot Pride, while using cards like Solitude and Brightglass Gearhulk to control the board. Ranger-Captain of Eos helps tutor for key creatures, while Haliya, Guided by Light provides additional card advantage. The deck also utilizes enchantments like Witch Enchanter and Starfield Shepherd to provide additional value. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures and maintain control of the board.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to pressure the opponent quickly. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells and combat tricks like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to control the board. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional power and resilience to the creatures. The deck has a good balance of creatures, removal, and disruption to maintain pressure and win the game quickly.

The deck focuses on assembling a fast and aggressive Eldrazi creature-based strategy, aiming to overwhelm opponents with powerful threats like Emrakul, Reality Smasher, and Thought-Knot Seer. It utilizes disruptive spells like Dismember and Kozilek's Command to control the board and protect its creatures. The deck maximizes the use of Eldrazi Temple and Cavern of Souls to help cast its high-cost Eldrazi creatures quickly and efficiently. The mix of aggressive creatures and disruption spells allows the deck to put pressure on opponents early while maintaining a strong board presence throughout the game.
